description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a sprawling, L-shaped layout and a combination of flat and gable roofs. The exterior features a mix of dark and light materials, with large windows and sliding glass doors opening onto a backyard patio and swimming pool. The front of the house includes a driveway with two parked cars, landscaped greenery, and a covered entryway. The backyard is enclosed with fencing and includes a pool, lounge area, and additional landscaping. The house appears to have an open courtyard or atrium in the center, visible from above. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story L-shaped house with a mix of flat and gable roofs, large windows, a central courtyard, and a backyard pool. The exterior features dark and light materials, landscaped areas, and a covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two cars, landscaped entry, and the main covered entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, linear wing of the house, fencing, and a glimpse of the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, swimming pool, lounge area, and large glass doors opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, fencing, and additional landscaping, with the pool area partially visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and sliding glass doors, asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a flat roof, landscaped approach, and modern door; no visible steps or columns
